---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
     STUDENT PORTAL PASSWORD
     Change STUDENT_PASSWORD below at the start of each semester.
     Tell students this password on the first day of class.
     ============================================================ -->
<script>
const STUDENT_PASSWORD = "econ2026";

function checkPassword() {
  const input = document.getElementById('pw-input').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  if (input === STUDENT_PASSWORD) {
    sessionStorage.setItem('student_auth', STUDENT_PASSWORD);
    showPortal();
  } else {
    document.getElementById('pw-error').style.display = 'block';
  }
}

function showPortal() {
  document.getElementById('password-gate').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('student-portal').style.display = 'block';
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  if (sessionStorage.getItem('student_auth') === STUDENT_PASSWORD) {
    showPortal();
  }
});

document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') checkPassword();
});
</script>

<div class="content-section">

<div id="password-gate" class="password-gate">
  <h2>Student Portal</h2>
  <p>Enter the course password provided on the first day of class.</p>
  <input type="password" id="pw-input" placeholder="Password" autofocus>
  <button onclick="checkPassword()">Enter</button>
  <div id="pw-error" class="error">Incorrect password. Please try again.</div>
</div>

<div id="student-portal" style="display:none;">
  <h2 class="section-heading">Student Portal</h2>
  <p>Select your course below to access slides, problem sets, and announcements.</p>

  <div class="course-grid">

    <div class="course-card">
      <div class="course-code">Econ 365</div>
      <div class="course-name">Natural Resource Economics</div>
      <div class="course-desc" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">Winter 2026</div>
      <a href="econ365.html" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" style="font-size:0.82rem;padding:0.35rem 0.9rem;">Go to course →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="course-card">
      <div class="course-code">Econ 467</div>
      <div class="course-name">Environmental Economics</div>
      <div class="course-desc" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">Winter 2026</div>
      <a href="econ467.html" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" style="font-size:0.82rem;padding:0.35rem 0.9rem;">Go to course →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="course-card">
      <div class="course-code">Econ 566</div>
      <div class="course-name">Graduate Methods</div>
      <div class="course-desc" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">As scheduled</div>
      <a href="econ566.html" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" style="font-size:0.82rem;padding:0.35rem 0.9rem;">Go to course →</a>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
